flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Valdosta State University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (8.4k → 6.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Valdosta State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Valdosta State University rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (56.0% → 71.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Valdosta State University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (20.8% → 25.4%).
